file.content:
name: Overall Test Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches: [ develop, dev/*, release/* ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ develop, dev/*, release/* ]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  pull-requests: write

env:
  NODE_OPTIONS: --max-old-space-size=4096

jobs:
  partial-tests:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/partial-tests.yml

  coverage:
    timeout-minutes: 50
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install-dependencies
        uses: ./.github/actions/install
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
          os: 'ubuntu-latest'
          pipfile-version: 'min'

      - name: Pytest
        run: |
          pipenv run pytest --cov=taipy --cov-report="xml:overall-coverage.xml" tests

      - name: Coverage
        uses: orgoro/coverage@v3.1
        with:
          coverageFile: overall-coverage.xml
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  overall-tests:
    needs: [partial-tests]
    timeout-minutes: 50
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.9', '3.10', '3.11', '3.12']
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-14]
        pipfile-version: ['min', 'max']
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{matrix.python-version}}

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install-dependencies
        uses: ./.github/actions/install
        with:
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          os: ${{ matrix.os }}
          pipfile-version: ${{ matrix.pipfile-version }}

      - name: Pytest
        run: |
          pipenv run pytest -m "not orchestrator_dispatcher and not standalone and not teste2e" tests

  intermittent-tests:
    needs: [partial-tests]
    timeout-minutes: 40
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ['3.9', '3.10', '3.11', '3.12']
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-14]
        orchestrator: ['orchestrator_dispatcher', 'standalone']
        pipfile-version: ['min', 'max']
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{matrix.python-version}}

      - name: Install dependencies
        uses: ./.github/actions/install
        with:
          os: ${{ matrix.os }}
          install-gui: false
          python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
          pipfile-version: ${{ matrix.pipfile-version }}

      - name: Pytest Core orchestrator_dispatcher
        run: pipenv run pytest -m "${{ matrix.orchestrator }}" tests/core

file.content:
name: install
description: Install the package and dependencies
inputs:
  python-version:
    required: true
    description: 'Python version'
  os:
    required: true
    description: 'Operating system'
  install-gui:
    required: false
    description: 'Whether to install the GUI dependencies'
    default: true
  pipfile-version:
    required: false
    description: 'The Pipfile type: one of min, max'
    default: 'min'
outputs:
  to-update:
    description: "True if the dependencies can be updated"
    value: ${{ steps.install-dependencies.outputs.diff != '' }}
runs:
  using: "composite"
  steps:
    - name: Replace Pipfile if pipfile-version = max
      if: inputs.pipfile-version == 'max'
      run: |
        # Override the current Pipfile with the Pipfile containing the max versions
        rm Pipfile
        mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile${{ inputs.python-version }}.max Pipfile
      shell: bash

    - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
      with:
        python-version: ${{ inputs.python-version }}
        cache: 'pipenv'
        cache-dependency-path: 'Pipfile'

    - name: Install pipenv
      run: pip install "pipenv<2025.0.0"
      shell: bash

    - name: Install pipenv dependencies
      run: pipenv install --dev --python=${{ inputs.python-version }}
      shell: bash

    - name: Setup LibMagic (MacOS)
      if: inputs.os == 'macos-14' && inputs.install-gui
      run: brew install libmagic
      shell: bash

    - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      if: inputs.install-gui
      with:
        node-version: 20
        cache: 'npm'
        cache-dependency-path: '**/package-lock.json'

    - name: Hash frontend source code
      if: inputs.install-gui
      id: hash-frontend
      run: |
        pipenv run python tools/frontend/hash_source.py
        echo "HASH=$(cat hash.txt)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        rm hash.txt
      shell: bash

    - name: Restore cached frontend build
      if: inputs.install-gui
      id: cache-fe-build
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          taipy/gui/webapp
          taipy/gui_core/lib
        key: frontend-build-${{ runner.os }}-${{ steps.hash-frontend.outputs.HASH }}

    - name: Frontend Bundle Build
      if: inputs.install-gui && steps.cache-fe-build.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
      run: pipenv run python tools/frontend/bundle_build.py
      shell: bash

    - name: Install Playwright
      if: inputs.install-gui
      run: pipenv run playwright install chromium --with-deps
      shell: bash

content.thinking:
Good! Now I understand the install action. Since the job is:
- python-version: 3.11
- os: ubuntu-latest
- pipfile-version: max
- install-gui: true (default)

The steps are:
1. Replace Pipfile with the max version one: `mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile3.11.max Pipfile`
2. Setup Python 3.11 with pipenv cache
3. Install pipenv
4. Install pipenv dependencies: `pipenv install --dev --python=3.11`
5. (Skip MacOS libmagic)
6. Setup Node 20 (for frontend)
7. Hash frontend source code
8. Restore cached frontend build
9. Frontend Bundle Build (if cache miss)
10. Install Playwright for chromium

Then the test step:
```
pipenv run pytest -m "not orchestrator_dispatcher and not standalone and not teste2e" tests
```

content.thinking:
Now I have enough information to create the Dockerfile and run.sh. Let me summarize what I need:

For Python 3.11 on ubuntu-latest with max pipfile version:

1. Base image: ubuntu:22.04 (ubuntu-latest)
2. Install system dependencies: git, curl, python3.11, npm, and dependencies for libmagic, playwright
3. Install Python 3.11
4. Clone/copy the repo
5. Run the install action steps:
   - Replace Pipfile with Pipfile3.11.max
   - Setup Python cache for pipenv
   - Install pipenv
   - Install pipenv dependencies
   - Setup Node 20
   - Hash frontend source code
   - Build frontend
   - Install Playwright
6. Run pytest: `pipenv run pytest -m "not orchestrator_dispatcher and not standalone and not teste2e" tests`

Let me start writing the Dockerfile and run.sh.

content.text:
Now I have all the context. Let me write the Dockerfile and run.sh for the overall-tests job with Python 3.11, ubuntu-latest, and max pipfile version.

**PHASE 2 — Write Dockerfile and run.sh**

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    wget \
    build-essential \
    python3.11 \
    python3.11-dev \
    python3-pip \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    libmagic1 \
    libxss1 \
    libappindicator1 \
    libindicator7 \
    fonts-liberation \
    libnss3 \
    libappindicator3-1 \
    libxss1 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set python3.11 as default python and python3
RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3.11 1 && \
    update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.11 1

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Replace Pipfile with max version for Python 3.11
RUN rm Pipfile && mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile3.11.max Pipfile

# Install pipenv with pip
RUN pip install "pipenv<2025.0.0"

# Install pipenv dependencies
RUN pipenv install --dev --python=3.11

# Setup Node and install npm dependencies
RUN npm install -g npm@latest

# Hash frontend source code
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/hash_source.py

# Build frontend
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/bundle_build.py

# Install Playwright
RUN pipenv run playwright install chromium --with-deps

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking:
The build failed because the Node.js version in ubuntu:22.04 is old (v12.22.9) and npm can't be updated to the latest version. I need to install a newer version of Node.js. Let me use NodeSource repository to install Node.js 20.x.

content.text: The build failed because the Node.js version is too old. Let me update the Dockerfile to install Node.js 20 from the NodeSource repository:

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    wget \
    build-essential \
    python3.11 \
    python3.11-dev \
    python3-pip \
    libmagic1 \
    libxss1 \
    libappindicator1 \
    libindicator7 \
    fonts-liberation \
    libnss3 \
    libappindicator3-1 \
    libxss1 \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node.js 20 from NodeSource
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set python3.11 as default python and python3
RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3.11 1 && \
    update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.11 1

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Replace Pipfile with max version for Python 3.11
RUN rm Pipfile && mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile3.11.max Pipfile

# Install pipenv with pip
RUN pip install "pipenv<2025.0.0"

# Install pipenv dependencies
RUN pipenv install --dev --python=3.11

# Hash frontend source code
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/hash_source.py

# Build frontend
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/bundle_build.py

# Install Playwright
RUN pipenv run playwright install chromium --with-deps

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies

    git \
    curl \

    python3.11-dev \
    python3-pip \

    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Node.js 20 from NodeSource
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set python3.11 as default python and python3
RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3.11 1 && \
    update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.11 1

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Replace Pipfile with max version for Python 3.11
RUN rm Pipfile && mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile3.11.max Pipfile

# Install pipenv with pip
RUN pip install "pipenv<2025.0.0"

# Install pipenv dependencies
RUN pipenv install --dev --python=3.11

# Hash frontend source code
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/hash_source.py

# Build frontend
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/bundle_build.py

# Install Playwright
RUN pipenv run playwright install chromium --with-deps

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

lines: # Set python3.11 as default python and python3
-# Setup Node and install npm dependencies

tool_use_result.originalFile:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    wget \
    build-essential \
    python3.11 \
    python3.11-dev \
    python3-pip \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    libmagic1 \
    libxss1 \
    libappindicator1 \
    libindicator7 \
    fonts-liberation \
    libnss3 \
    libappindicator3-1 \
    libxss1 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set python3.11 as default python and python3
RUN update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3.11 1 && \
    update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python3 python3 /usr/bin/python3.11 1

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Replace Pipfile with max version for Python 3.11
RUN rm Pipfile && mv tools/packages/pipfiles/Pipfile3.11.max Pipfile

# Install pipenv with pip
RUN pip install "pipenv<2025.0.0"

# Install pipenv dependencies
RUN pipenv install --dev --python=3.11

# Setup Node and install npm dependencies
RUN npm install -g npm@latest

# Hash frontend source code
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/hash_source.py

# Build frontend
RUN pipenv run python tools/frontend/bundle_build.py

# Install Playwright
RUN pipenv run playwright install chromium --with-deps

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
